BT) is correct. (It is certain that the Lagna longitude should
have some relation with Gulika. Therefore, the astrologer
should know that -) The sign in which Gulika is placed, or
the sign in which Gulika Navamsa is placed or the trines of
these two can be the Lagna (If not make the necessary
adjustment in given BT to accomplish the same)]
